message:
feat: make SSE the default MCP connection method on pi.ruv.io

Restructure Guide modal MCP tab to lead with SSE (one command, no
install) and demote npx/Cargo to an optional "Local install" step.
Update main page terminal section to show SSE first.

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>

files.patch:
@@ -660,13 +660,13 @@

$ export BRAIN_URL="https://pi.ruv.io" # 2. Add π as an MCP server -# Option A: NPX (Node.js — 91 tools, local stdio) -$ claude mcp add ruvector -- npx ruvector mcp start - -# Option B: SSE (remote — 21 brain tools, no install) +# Recommended: SSE (remote — 21 brain tools, no install) $ claude mcp add pi-brain --transport sse https://pi.ruv.io/sse -# Option C: Rust (Cargo — 21 brain tools, local stdio) +# Alternative: NPX (Node.js — 91 tools, local stdio) +$ claude mcp add ruvector -- npx ruvector mcp start + +# Alternative: Rust (Cargo — 21 brain tools, local stdio) $ claude mcp add pi-brain -- cargo run -p mcp-brain # 3. NPX: 91 tools / Cargo: 21 brain tools @@ -1044,48 +1044,27 @@

Drift detection

-
1
+
1
-

Configure environment

-

Set your key and backend URL so the MCP server knows where to connect.

-
export BRAIN_API_KEY="your_key" -export BRAIN_URL="https://pi.ruv.io"
+

Connect via SSE RECOMMENDED

+

One command. No install. Connect to the live π brain directly via Server-Sent Events — works with Claude Code or any MCP client.

+
claude mcp add pi-brain --transport sse https://pi.ruv.io/sse
+

21 brain tools. Zero dependencies. Always up-to-date.

2
-

Register MCP server

-

Add π to Claude Code. Use npx for 91 tools (recommended) or Cargo for 21 brain tools.

-
# Recommended: 91 tools via npx -claude mcp add ruvector -- npx ruvector mcp start - -# Alternative: 21 brain tools via Cargo -claude mcp add pi-brain -- cargo run -p mcp-brain
+

Set your API key

+

Generate a key above, then export it so the brain authenticates your contributions.

+
export BRAIN_API_KEY="your_key"
3
-
-

Remote SSE transport

-

Connect to the live brain directly via Server-Sent Events — no local install needed. Add as a remote MCP server in Claude Code or any MCP client.

-
# Add as remote MCP server (SSE) -claude mcp add pi-brain --transport sse https://pi.ruv.io/sse - -# Test the SSE endpoint directly -curl -N https://pi.ruv.io/sse -H "Accept: text/event-stream" - -# Send JSON-RPC to the session -curl -X POST "https://pi.ruv.io/messages?sessionId=SESSION_ID" \ - -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ - -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"tools/list"}'
-
-
-
-
4

Use brain tools

-

All 91 tools (npx), 21 brain tools (Cargo), or 21 tools via SSE are now in your session. Share, search, vote, transfer — all through natural language.

+

21 brain tools are now in your session. Share, search, vote, transfer — all through natural language.

brain_share Share a learning brain_search Semantic search brain_vote Quality gate @@ -1097,6 +1076,18 @@

Use brain tools

brain_node_* WASM node publish
+
+
alt
+
+

Local install (optional)

+

For 91 tools (hooks, workers, RVF, edge, identity) or offline use, install locally via npx or Cargo.

+
# NPX: 91 tools (local stdio) +claude mcp add ruvector -- npx ruvector mcp start + +# Cargo: 21 brain tools (local stdio) +claude mcp add pi-brain -- cargo run -p mcp-brain
+
